ocr_findings.description: Image contains two diagrams (DFD-style flow diagram with データストア/処理/外部 boxes, and a BSC 4-perspectives diagram) both represented as image placeholders in OCR — acceptable for figures.

OCR text ends mid-sentence with '「業務プ' — the OCR file is truncated at the page boundary. The image shows the sentence continues but this is expected page-boundary behavior. No mid-page content is lost.

reviewer_notes: Page is Lesson 05-02 業務プロセス content page explaining 仕事の手順とシステム開発 and バランススコアカード（BSC）context, with DFD diagram and BSC diagram. All body paragraphs are faithfully captured. The truncation at end is a page-boundary artifact not a content loss. Page footer '173' in image corresponds to pipeline page_189 offset.
